Perform a deep architectural and logic review of the project. Focus on the recent bugfixes for ghost trades and auto-heal state desync in eth_bot.py. Audit the Telegram notification logic for production readiness.

Audit the project for security vulnerabilities. Focus on eth_bot.py sensitive data handling and investigate the ACE risk in terminal_execute identified during the orchestration layer audit. Recommend hardening measures for production deployment.

Perform a deep architectural and logic audit of the CRM (src/app/crm) and Lead API (src/app/api/leads). Check for state desync, race conditions in lead capture, and inconsistent UI transitions. Reference the recent CRM Restoration commits.
Audit src/auth.ts, src/middleware.ts, and all routes in src/app/api/admin for auth bypass, privilege escalation, and sensitive data leaks in logs. Check CSP configuration in next.config.mjs.
Analyze the performance of CRM dashboards (AdReportDashboard.tsx) and lead processing routes. Check for N+1 queries in Prisma and blocking operations in Server Actions.
Deep review of SmartMoney MTF Monitor in sm-playground/. Focus on agent logic, multi-timeframe synchronization, and robustness of the new non-blocking notification system.
Analyze the performance of the main monitoring loop in sm-playground/main.py and the backtest execution in sm-playground/backtest.py.
Generate comprehensive unit tests for all agents in sm-playground/agents/.
Review the code in sm-playground/. Focus on multi-agent coordination, structural analysis logic (BOS), and the new non-blocking Telegram notifier. Provide exact findings in Markdown.
